subcodes.first_line: The Divine Day doth in itself proclaim, and summoneth them that dwell on earth unto the Most Exalted Horizon [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یوم الهی بنفسه ندا مینماید و من علی الارض را بافق اعلی دعوت میفرماید این یوم
subcodes.subjects: @living waters; water of life, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @knowledge; recognition of God, @mysteries and their discovery; the mystical vision, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
